name: The Law Offices of Stuart B. Handelman, P.C.
description_short: Chicago bankruptcy law firm offering Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 representation across Chicagoland, with free video consultations and online appointments.
description_long:
The Law Offices of Stuart B. Handelman, P.C. is a Chicago-based bankruptcy law firm that has served the Chicagoland area for multiple decades. Lead attorney Stuart Bradley Handelman is supported by a named team including attorneys Jean Huang and Kelly Smith, and legal assistant Desiree Glapion. The firm has accumulated hundreds of five-star client reviews and earned the Avvo Clients' Choice Award in 2022. Multiple office locations across the Chicago metropolitan area provide geographic accessibility for suburban and city residents alike.

The firm handles both Chapter 7 liquidation bankruptcy and Chapter 13 repayment-plan bankruptcy, and explicitly markets non-bankruptcy alternatives as well, indicating a willingness to counsel clients on the full range of debt relief options rather than defaulting to filing. Prospective clients can schedule a free video consultation before committing to any engagement. Online appointment scheduling is available, reducing the need for in-person visits during the intake phase. The firm also represents clients at mandatory court hearings, as referenced in multiple testimonials.

What distinguishes this firm in a crowded Chicago bankruptcy market is the consistent testimonial record tied to specific named attorneys and staff rather than the firm as a whole. Reviewers repeatedly name Jean Huang for her patience and hearing preparation, Kelly Smith for case management and professionalism, and Stuart Handelman personally for explanations of costs and ongoing post-discharge availability. The firm emphasizes transparency on fees, with one reviewer specifically noting no hidden charges. The combination of video consultations and multiple physical locations reflects a deliberate hybrid access model.

Honestly assessed, this is a well-reviewed single-practice bankruptcy firm with clear strengths in personal service and client communication. The website has visible template artifacts ('Slide title, Write your caption here') suggesting the site has not been fully maintained, which may affect first impressions. No fee schedule is published online, so prospective clients must contact the office to understand costs. The practice is geographically limited to Illinois, and the most recent testimonials date to 2022, leaving the current staffing composition somewhat unclear.
address: 20200 Governors Dr Suite 201E, Olympia Fields, IL 60461

company_info.headquarters: 20200 Governors Dr Suite 201E, Olympia Fields, IL 60461

pros: Free video consultation offered before any financial commitment
Named attorneys Jean Huang and Kelly Smith cited repeatedly in reviews for professionalism and accessibility
Stuart Handelman personally available by phone, email, and in-office per client testimony
No hidden charges — fee transparency flagged positively in reviews
Clients' Choice Award 2022 from Avvo based on client reviews
Explicitly offers non-bankruptcy alternatives, not just filing
Post-discharge counsel available — one client noted Handelman remained reachable three years after case closure
cons: Geographic limitation to Chicagoland — no service outside Illinois
No fee schedule published online; costs unknown without contacting the firm
Website contains unfilled template placeholders ('Slide title, Write your caption here'), suggesting neglected web presence
Most recent client review on the site dates to September 2022 — current staff roster and service quality unverified beyond that date
best_for: Illinois residents facing Chapter 7 liquidation who want a named, accessible attorney
Chapter 13 filers who need hands-on hearing preparation and court representation
Consumers unsure whether bankruptcy is the right path and wanting a free consultation to explore alternatives
Clients who prefer video or online intake rather than an in-person first visit
diagnosis: Best for Chicagoland residents who want a personally accessible bankruptcy attorney with a documented track record of named-staff client service across both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 cases. The main caveat is that fees are not disclosed online and must be discussed in consultation, and the firm's geographic reach is strictly limited to the Chicago metropolitan area.
services: Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing and repayment plan representation
Multiple Chicagoland office locations for in-person meetings
Phone and email client communication throughout case
Payment plan options (online payment accepted per website)
